title: [CI:DOCS] docs: include Go bindings tutorial

comments.body:
> Probably ought to add a link here too: https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/docs/tutorials/README.md

done, PTAL.

LGTM
thanks @lsm5 and @ParkerVR for putting this together.

@lsm5 the trick to avoiding CI is to put `[CI:DOCS]` (brackets are customary but not required) in the subject of your PR. Just an FYI for next time. ( /me sneaks back out - I'm not qualified to review the content )

> @lsm5 the trick to avoiding CI is to put `[CI:DOCS]` (brackets are customary but not required) in the subject of your PR. Just an FYI for next time. ( /me sneaks back out - I'm not qualified to review the content )

done.
